"[6] ^CT713-1 -- THERE WAS NO SINKHOLE LOCATED BY CT AT TIME OF RECENT INSPECTION, BUT WILL GO CHK THE AREA AGAIN"

"[5] ^1039 CT713-1 -- THERE WAS AN ADDL CALL ON 260417BC0843, NOT SURE IF IT'S THE SAME RP OR NOT, BUT CHP WAS UTL ON ANY SINKHOLE / SR#2354272 WAS SENT TO CT713 CREW AS A PRECAUTION and REG ROUNDS CHK WAS PERFORMED / THERE ARE SOME CONCRETE SLABS NEEDING REPLACEMENT, AND THAT'S BEING REFERRED TO CONST"

"[2] RP STATES HE IS CERTAIN THERE IS WATER DMG DOWN THE CANYON UNDER THE FWY AND A MASSIVE SINKHOLE UNDER THE FWY THAT AFFECTS THE WHOLE FWY AND THE #1 and #2 LN ESPECIALLY SO IN THIS AREA CAUSING IT TO BUCKLE TOWARDS THE RIGHT"
